reviews.review_description: I first started during the winter update and i grinded up to 5 million coins. I worked so hard decorating my garden with cacoas and ice blossoms. I also bought a ton of my dream pets. I spent a week or two growing my ice blossoms to colossal hights, then all of a sudden one day all of my cocoas were completely gone. My ice blossoms, fire lilies, everything i spent months working on were completely erased.  i tried to rebuild everything, but then ALL OF MY COINS WERE GONE. AND MY PETS! AT LEAST GIVE ME MY STUFF BACK OR SOMETHING! now every time i log i feel depressed knowing i wasted so much time on a stupid game that needs fixing. Please, if there is anything you can do please help me out.

reviews.review_title: Here's a rundown with my experience.
reviews.review_description: I played this game all the time. Despite all the racist kids and the buggy gardens, i had fun. I worked hard on my garden and got good at the game. I then joined the discord for fun but that's where it went wrong. I made one small joke, nothing offensive or rude because I'm a nice guy. I then got permanently banned from the server and couldn't do anything. -keep in mind I've helped out that community before. I was upset and brushed it off and kept playing the game. I then took a break from vr and came back. EVERY SINGLE THING IN MY GARDEN WAS GONE! I started a new garden admitting defeat. I bought a seed, planted it, saved and left. I came back and that seed wasn't there anymore! i lost my money and didn't have the seed. So i now cant play the game. Lucky me! i have a mods discord and they told me to take my issue to the discord server. I can't do that cuz he banned me. I still to this day cant play. Overall i don't recommend. The moderation in game is horrible. Keep in mind I'm going off past experience so if this is fixed let me know please! -glorpz or shadowz-

The last time I played there was only one bundle and not much was pay to win but now there’s a lot of pay to win. Hope this helps you know what we want and how this game is gonna die.
I’m sick and tired of people acting like ther stealing other people’s stuff for content and people making you delete your plants and being toxic but this is a good game grow a garden in vr!

reviews.review_title: This game is great (in my opinion)
reviews.review_description:
The game is fun, you have to work for your garden, starting off is difficult but that makes it more fun, and making money is kinda easy.

Some downsides are people are toxic, half of the game is p2w, and you need money to get the tokens because one quest needs you to activate 3 mods and that 5+ dollars

Some things they should add back is the old menu where you could drag it around and pick up the fruits by moving into it, also they should bring back the old sprinklers when it only grew the fruit on the tree not the tree with it (because it makes it more difficult to collect your fruits).

Overall 4/5 stars
